_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after AU Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Security incidents are logged for tabletop drills, and example breach playbooks use placeholder account numbers (e.g., ACC-9999-TEST) and invalid IDs, not live customer data.

must_detect.matched_text: Security incidents are logged for tabletop drills, and example breach playbooks use placeholder account numbers (e.g., ACC-9999-TEST) and invalid IDs, not live customer data.

must_not_detect.reason: Educational marketing example; not a market-sensitive disclosure
Explicit placeholder example; not live customer data or real account number
Exchange ticker placeholder; not PII or MNPI
Generic policy term, not an insider list marker

uncertain.reason: Legally relevant preservation control but no explicit allowed retention marker in the rule list
Access/erasure workflow is privacy-relevant but not mapped to an allowed marker category
Indicates sensitive health/safety records contextually, but not a specific individual's health condition or treatment
